title: Error reading properties of undefined in downstream node
symptom: When referencing the CSV output as {{data}}, the next node throws an error indicating it cannot read properties of undefined. This prevents further processing of the CSV data.
applies_when: Referencing output incorrectly in downstream nodes
not_this_if: Correctly referencing the output in the next node
root_cause: The error occurs because the downstream node is trying to access a property of an undefined variable. This typically happens when the output from the Convert to CSV node is not correctly passed or referenced in the subsequent node.
fix_steps: Check the output settings of the Convert to CSV node
Ensure 'Put Output File in Field' is set to 'data'
Reference the output correctly in the next node without using curly braces
agent_instruction: Ensure the output from the Convert to CSV node is referenced correctly in the next node.
